name: io.github.studiomeyer-io/local-memory-mcp
title: Local Memory
description: Persistent local memory. SQLite + FTS5 + sqlite-vec hybrid retrieval, bi-temporal asOf queries, contradiction detection, LLM-free reflection, multilingual embeddings, Knowledge Graph. 21 tools. No cloud, no API keys.

environmentVariables.description: Custom path for the SQLite database file
environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_DB_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Disable the local embedding pipeline (forces FTS5-only search). Useful in restricted networks where the model can't be downloaded.
environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_EMBED_DISABLED

environmentVariables.description: Override the embedding model id (defaults to Xenova/multilingual-e5-small).
environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_EMBED_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Override the Transformers.js cache directory (defaults to the OS data dir).
environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_EMBED_CACHE_DIR
